name: git_backup_restore
description: Backs up or restores the agent workspace using Git. Supports committing current workspace state (backup) or reverting to a previous commit (restore). Useful for versioning agent work.

parameters.operation: 'backup' to commit and push current state, 'restore' to revert to a previous commit, 'log' to list recent commits
parameters.commit: Commit hash to restore to (for restore operation)

returns: Status of the git operation and relevant output
